name: FREE Proxy Guide 2026
description:
JANITOR AI FREE PROXY (CLOUDFLARE)

openrouter acting up? yeah same.
this setup is better for most of you anyway.

this uses:

  • google gemini (lite preview)

  • cloudflare worker (as proxy)

  • works directly in janitor like openai

⚡ WHY THIS OVER OPENROUTER?

  • 1000 messages/day free (lite preview)

  • faster streaming (no delay mid-response)

  • handles long chats + lorebooks WAY better

  • more stable for RP bots

🧩 STEP 1: GET GEMINI API KEY

go here:
https://aistudio.google.com/app/apikey

create a key and copy it.



don’t lose it. if you do, that’s on you.

🧩 STEP 2: GET THE PROXY CODE

copy this:
https://pastebin.com/LJc8e8mP

(go inside this link)

you don’t need to understand the code. just copy it.

🧩 STEP 3: CLOUDFLARE WORKER SETUP

go here:
https://dash.cloudflare.com/

then:

  1. create account

  2. create new worker

  3. delete the default code

  4. paste the code you copied

  5. click deploy


after deploying, you’ll get a link like:

https://your-name.workers.dev

this is your proxy URL.

🧩 STEP 4: CONNECT TO JANITOR AI

go to:
Settings → API Settings

set this:

API Type:
Proxy

API URL:
https://your-name.workers.dev (the link you copied)
(DO NOT add /chat/completeions)

API Key:
(your gemini api key)

[ADD IMAGE HERE – janitor api settings]
creator: Insomniac_360
